recommendations.title: The Courier
recommendations.overview: Cold War spy Greville Wynne and his Russian source try to put an end to the Cuban Missile Crisis.

recommendations.title: Thirteen Days
recommendations.overview: The story of the Cuban Missile Crisis in 1962—the nuclear standoff with the USSR sparked by the discovery by the Americans of missile bases established on the Soviet-allied island of Cuba.

recommendations.title: Searching for Bobby Fischer
recommendations.overview: A seven-year-old chess prodigy refuses to harden himself in order to become a champion like the famous but unlikable Bobby Fischer.

recommendations.title: A Single Man
recommendations.overview: Set in Los Angeles in 1962, at the height of the Cuban missile crisis, is the story of a British college professor who dwells on the past and cannot see his future. We follow him through a single day, where a series of events and encounters ultimatel

recommendations.title: Operation Hyacinth
recommendations.overview: Not satisfied with the result of a murder investigation in Warsaw's gay community, an officer in 1980s communist Poland resolves to uncover the truth.

recommendations.title: Matinee
recommendations.overview: A showman introduces a small coastal town to a unique movie experience and capitalizes on the Cuban Missile crisis hysteria with a kitschy horror extravaganza combining film effects, stage props and actors in rubber suits in this salute to the B-movi

recommendations.title: The Furies
recommendations.overview: A young woman faces her darkest fears with seven other unwilling participants in a deadly game — a game that can only have one winner.

recommendations.title: Geri's Game
recommendations.overview: An aging codger named Geri plays a daylong game of chess in the park against himself. Somehow, he begins losing to his livelier opponent. But just when the game's nearly over, Geri manages to turn the tables.

recommendations.title: Never Back Down: No Surrender
recommendations.overview: Picking up after the events of Never Back Down 2, former MMA champion Case Walker is on the comeback trail to become champion once again.

recommendations.title: Kabir Singh
recommendations.overview: Kabir, a genius yet hostile medical student, falls in love with Preeti from his college. When Preeti's father spots the couple kissing, he opposes their relationship and decides to marry her off.
